validator_role: Phase 6 finalization (writer != approver: validation/repair distinct from the design/implementation steps)

targeted_tests.command: uv run python -m pytest -q tests/test_phase2_anti_compression.py tests/test_phase2_topic_catalog_planning.py tests/test_coverage_validation.py

implementation_validation.real_catalog_budget_check: derive_breadth_budget over the real RAGFlow topic-catalog.json (147 topics / 94 must / 12 must-families / 82 must-subsystems) -> min_total_pages=36, max_total_pages=95, min_leaf_pages=23, min_required_topics=94 (vs the prior 21-page / 42-TER collapse)

python_hard_rules.no_import_time_side_effects: pass (module level is defs/constants only; util imported inside loader)
python_hard_rules.no_stray_artifacts: pass (only intended files changed; stub dir removed)

deferred: Standalone Phase 4 gate that loads plans/promoted-topic-contract.json and fails end-to-end when a promoted leaf topic with evidence is missing from generated output (the data-contract plumbing + catalog_topic_id passthrough + the omitted-promoted-topic failure proof are shipped; the dedicated cross-referencing gate is the next slice).
Billed live RAGFlow run to confirm the hardened prompt + budget reach source-derived page/topic targets.
repair_notes: Two test assertions failed initially due to markdown-bold and line-wrapping in the Gem prompt files; repaired the test (whitespace-normalize + stable phrase). No design or production-code change was required by validation.
